content: Uttar Pradesh Technical Admission The following steps have to be followed for registration in counseling.
Uttar Pradesh Technical Admission 2026 The process of counseling will be in multiple rounds.
The registration process for the first round will start from 25 May 2026 to Course Wise Last Date.

Uttar Pradesh Technical Admission Counseling 2026 Through B Tech First Year Through JEEMAIN 2026, registration will have to be done in UPTAC counseling and along with the documents will also have to be provided.
After registration and uploading the documents in Uttar Pradesh Technical Admission Counselling, the candidate will have to pay the registration fee.

The verification of the candidate’s document will be done by the UPTAC Central Document Verification Team and after the completion of the verification process, the candidate will be informed through SMS / Email.
After the completion of the verification process, the candidate will have to do online choice filling, in which he will have to select the college and branch of his choice.
Declaration of UPTAC First Year Seat Allotment Results
Choose Option / Seat Acceptance (Freeze /Float R1, Freeze/Float R2 & R3, Auto Freeze R4) via Payment of Acceptance Fee.
Reporting at allotted Institute.
Candidates who did not get the college will have to check their result in the next round and choice filling will also have to be done according to the round.
For More Details Must Read the Full UPTAC 2026 Counseling Procedure .

textSections.section: How to Apply SSC One Time Registration OTR Online Form 2025
textSections.content: Staff Selection Commission SSC issued a notice on 22 February 2024 saying that they have launched a new website SSC Gov in, in which all the candidates will have to do fresh one time registration (OTR) | Step 1 : Open the Website ssc.gov.in or Direct Link Will be in this Page Some Useful Important Links Section | Step 2 : Click on New Registration Tab | Step 3 : Students will have to give their basic information such as: Name, Father’s Name, Mother’s Name, Mobile Number, Email Id and High School Class 10 Roll Number. | Step 4 : Verify Your OTR Profile Details & Submit Registration. | Step 5 : An OTP will be received on the registered email and registered mobile number of the candidate, he will have to enter it. | Step 6 : The registration Part I process will be completed, the candidate will see the OTR Registration No. on the screen. | Step 7 : In the next step, you will have to change the default password which has been received on your email, after that you will have to login by writ

howToApply: Staff Selection Commission SSC issued a notice on 22 February 2024 saying that they have launched a new website SSC Gov in, in which all the candidates will have to do fresh one time registration (OTR)
Step 1 : Open the Website ssc.gov.in or Direct Link Will be in this Page Some Useful Important Links Section
Step 2 : Click on New Registration Tab
Step 3 : Students will have to give their basic information such as: Name, Father’s Name, Mother’s Name, Mobile Number, Email Id and High School Class 10 Roll Number
Step 4 : Verify Your OTR Profile Details & Submit Registration
Step 5 : An OTP will be received on the registered email and registered mobile number of the candidate, he will have to enter it
Step 6 : The registration Part I process will be completed, the candidate will see the OTR Registration No. on the screen

Step 7 : In the next step, you will have to change the default password which has been received on your email, after that you will have to login by writing the registration number along with the password which has been received on the email

Step 9 : Candidates should change the default password of OTR registration number with their custom password. Use capital letters, small letters, numbers and special characters while creating the new password which should be at least 08 digits. Additionally, two security questions will also have to be selected, so that if you forget your password in future, you can recover your password with the help of the security question

Step 10 : After changing the password, the candidate will have to login again, after that the information about his nationality, category, Visible Identification Mark and information about permanent and local address will be entered in the form

Step 11 : The last step is that here you have to first double check all the information by clicking on the preview button of OTR, after checking, if there is any error then correct it, otherwise click on the declare button and submit the form finally

Step 12 : The registration process of SSC OTR has now been completed, the candidate will be able to see the dashboard whenever any new recruitment comes, or the candidate can also get the information about admit card and result by logging into the SSC dashboard

Our team has also shown a video on how to do SSC one time registration, which you can watch and do your new registration by following the step by step process: SSC OTR Registration Kaise Kare Video Dekhe (Watch Video)
For more information, you have to complete the notice issued to SSC OTR
